params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 V7-F-A engine code change (run_id 20260506-223744-80392, 8/8 OK). Replaces V7-E's minimal entries[].text shape with schematized_response wrapper + parent_info:null + root-level answer + assistant.status=completed. Hypothesis HP-V7F-A: SPA reads entries[i].schematized_response.answer_modes[0].answer.markdown to populate the answer panel. If true, bubble should show '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' on hard reload. If still PARTIAL, escalate V7-F-B (blocks[] use_case wrapper).

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt → engine fires V7-C SSE block
3. SPA fetches /rest/thread/<UUID> → V7-F-A intercept fires (schematized_response wrapper)
5. Verify collateral analytics/widgets/sse all status=OK (no connection poison)
6. Capture DOM — answer panel content? bubble visible? warning text rendered?

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + Korean warning text in DOM + no H2 errors (V7-F-A confirms SPA consumes schematized_response.answer_modes[].answer.markdown)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_h2_clean_but_no_bubble: still empty answer panel — schematized_response shape variant didn't match. Escalate V7-F-B (blocks[] wrapper).
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_partial_render: some text visible but not warning — investigate which field SPA hydrated from
verdict_criteria.FAIL: regression vs #710 (H2 errors return) — schematized_response addition broke framing

check_details.expected_engine_log: [APF:perplexity_thread_intercept_v7e] thread_uuid=<UUID> body_len=N h2_len=N age_ms=N (note: log signature unchanged — V7-F-A only changed body content)

notes: 48차 V7-F-A: schematized_response wrapper + answer field + status:completed + parent_info:null. Body body size will be larger than V7-E (~806B → ~1.1KB). Tests HP-V7F-A. If FAIL with H2 errors, immediate revert to V7-E.
